titleStmt.title: SII 24.371: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 371.

summary.p: Damaged, Gives the king's praśasti containing a chronological account of his conquests. States that he visited the temple on the date specified and seems to enumerate a list of jewels and precious stones that he presented to the deity. Also records the remission on some villages evidently granted to the temple on the occasion. Of the details of the date of the king's visit, only the cyclic year Dhātu (=Śaka 1438), Māgha, ba. 11, Monday are preserved and these regularly correspond to 1517 A.D., February 16, Monday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mūru rāyaragaṁḍa Arirāyavibhāḍa Aṣṭadikkurāya manōbhayaṁkkara bhāṣe getapphuvarāyaragaṁḍḍa pūrva dakṣiṇapaścima samudrādhīśvara yavanarājyasthāpanācāryyagajapati vibhāḍa śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra kṛṣṇadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagarānanuṁḍḍi pūrpadigvijaya yātraku viccēśi Udayagiri durggamuṁnu sādiṁcci ravutarāyamahāpātruniṁ baṁdhiṁcci Addaṁki vinikoṁḍa bellaṁkoṁḍḍa . nāgārjjunikoṁḍḍataṁgeḍa kētavaraṁ modalayina giridurggasthaladurggālu Ēkadhāṭini kaikoni koṁḍavīṭi durgga puccukoni pratāparudragajapati rājula komāruṁḍu vīrabhadrarāyaṁḍu . komārahaṁvīramahāpātruni koḍkuFurther portion seems to be built into the maṇḍapa covering it over.
naraharidēvu . śrīmaṁtu . Uddaṁḍabānuṁḍu . jaṁnyāla kasavāpātruṁḍu . pūsapāṭirācirāju . śrīnātharāju . la(.)kṣmīpatirāju . paścimabāla caṁdramahāpātruṁḍu . vīru modalayina pātrasāmaṁtulānu malānu modalaina vārini jīvagrāhaṁgānu paṭṭukoni vāriki Abhayadānaṁ yicci raṇakoṭa Amarēśvarānanu tulāpuruṣa mahādānamu śāyana vadhariṁcci tirigi vijayanagarānaku viccēśi sāṁmrājyaṁ cēstuṁnu mari voka kaḷiṁgadēśa digvija yārththaṁ ḍaku viccēśi koṁḍapalli durggamuṁnu sādhiṁcci Ādurggaṁmīṁdanuṁnna praharāju dramahāpātruḍu coḍa layina pātra sāmaṁtulānu maṁne niṁni jīvagrāhaṁgānu paṭukoni vāriki [Abha]yadānaṁ yicci A koṁḍḍa Ullu
Arunapalli paluvela kaṁbhaṁvaṭṭuThis girimodalayina Ēkadhāṭini kaikoni siṁhādri śēśi jayastaṁbhaṁvēśi tīruna Agunēṭi dhātasaṁvatsara māgha bahuḷa 11 sōmavāraṁ nāṁḍu śrīraṁgānaku śiśrī kāpuku nēla varahālu ga māghamāsānanu pāliṁcina
This line is continued on the flat face next to the convolutetsavānaku [nellū ṁḍai nellūru] mālu 5 yīdēvuniki dhāravō 1 kūḍi 14 kiṁni viṭṭa rimaḍinenu śi paraṁ paragā yistimi vārikiṁnni padakaṁ 1 va rapaṇa padakaṁGreatly damaged and writing covered up by cement
This line is on the vertical face of the belt tier below the also greatly damaged as the previous one.122 keṁppulunnu vajrālu rpiṁcciri . yīgrāma talayārikkaṁ kaṇa ki Ivive na samasta varuluṁnnu māna gāvā Istiṁ ganaka yiṁ
Digital edition of SII 24.371 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
